---
title: "stwd_colors"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L175)

# `stwd_colors()`

List Available Color Names

## Usage

```r
stwd_colors(pattern = NULL, n = 20)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `pattern` | Optional regex pattern to filter color names. |
| `n` | Maximum number of colors to show. Default: 20. |

## Value

A data frame with color names and hex codes (invisibly).
Prints a formatted list to the console.

## Description

Shows common named colors with their hex equivalents for use with
`stwd_color()` or direct marquee syntax.

## Examples

```r
# Show common colors
stwd_colors()

# Search for blue colors
stwd_colors("blue")

# Search for dark colors
stwd_colors("dark")
```
